name: Ashwater
description: Exhaust any number of cards in your Hand.
description_raw: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] any number of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Attack Potion
description: Choose 1 of 3 random Attack cards to add into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.
description_raw: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random Attack cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.

name: Beetle Juice
description: Enemy's attacks deal {DamageDecrease}% less damage {Repeat:plural:next turn|for the next {} turns}.
description_raw: Enemy's attacks deal [blue]{DamageDecrease}%[/blue] less damage {Repeat:plural:next turn|for the next [blue]{}[/blue] turns}.

name: Blessing of the Forge
description: Upgrade all cards in your Hand for the rest of combat.
description_raw: [gold]Upgrade[/gold] all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] for the rest of combat.

name: Block Potion
description: Gain {Block} Block.

name: Blood Potion
description: Heal for {HealPercent}% of your Max HP.
description_raw: Heal for [green]{HealPercent}%[/green] of your Max HP.

name: Bone Brew
description: Summon {Summon}.

name: Bottled Potential
description: Shuffle ALL your cards into your Draw Pile. Draw {Cards} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
description_raw: Shuffle ALL your cards into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. Draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}.

name: Clarity Extract
description: Draw {Cards} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. At the start of your next {ClarityPower:plural:turn|{} turns}, draw 1 additional card.
description_raw: Draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] {Cards:plural:card|cards}. At the start of your next {ClarityPower:plural:turn|[blue]{}[/blue] turns}, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card.

name: Colorless Potion
description: Choose 1 of 3 random Colorless cards to add into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.
description_raw: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random Colorless cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.

name: Cosmic Concoction
description: Add {Cards} Upgraded Colorless {Cards:plural:card|cards} into your Hand.

name: Cunning Potion
description: Add {Cards} Upgraded {Cards:plural:Shiv|Shivs} into your Hand.

name: Cure All
description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Draw {Cards} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.

name: Dexterity Potion
description: Gain {DexterityPower} Dexterity.

name: Distilled Chaos
description: Play the top {Repeat} cards of your Draw Pile.
description_raw: Play the top [blue]{Repeat}[/blue] cards of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].

name: Droplet of Precognition
description: Choose a card in your Draw Pile and add it into your Hand.
description_raw: Choose a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and add it into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

name: Duplicator
description: This turn, your next card is played an extra time.
description_raw: This turn, your next card is played an extra time.

name: Energy Potion
description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.

name: Entropic Brew
description: Fill all your empty potion slots with random potions.
description_raw: Fill all your empty potion slots with random potions.

name: Essence of Darkness
description: Channel a Dark for each of your Orb Slots.
description_raw: [gold]Channel[/gold] a [gold]Dark[/gold] for each of your [gold]Orb Slots[/gold].

name: Explosive Ampoule
description: Deal {Damage} damage to ALL enemies.

name: Fairy in a Bottle
description: When you would die, instead this potion is discarded and you heal to 30% of your Max HP.
description_raw: When you would die, instead this potion is discarded and you heal to [blue]30%[/blue] of your Max HP.

name: Fire Potion
description: Deal {Damage} damage.

name: Flex Potion
description: Gain {StrengthPower} Strength. At the end of your turn, lose {StrengthPower} Strength.
description_raw: Gain [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold]. At the end of your turn, lose [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].

name: Focus Potion
description: Gain {FocusPower} Focus.

name: Fortifier
description: Triple your Block.

name: Foul Potion
description:
Deal {Damage} damage to EVERYONE.
Can be thrown at the Merchant for {Gold} Gold instead.
description_raw:
Deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to EVERYONE.
Can be thrown at the [gold]Merchant[/gold] for [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] instead.

name: Fruit Juice
description: Gain {MaxHp} Max HP.

name: Fysh Oil
description: Gain {StrengthPower} Strength and {DexterityPower} Dexterity.

name: Gambler's Brew
description: Discard any number of cards, then draw that many.
description_raw: Discard any number of cards, then draw that many.

name: Ghost in a Jar
description: Gain 1 Intangible.

name: Gigantification Potion
description: The next Attack you play deals triple damage.
description_raw: The next Attack you play deals triple damage.

name: Glowwater Potion
description: Exhaust your Hand. Draw {Cards} cards.

name: Heart of Iron
description: Gain {PlatingPower} Plating.

name: King's Courage
description: Forge {Forge}.

name: Liquid Bronze
description: Gain {ThornsPower} Thorns.

name: Liquid Memories
description: Put a card from your Discard Pile into your Hand. It costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.
description_raw: Put a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It costs [blue]0[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.

name: Lucky Tonic
description: Gain {BufferPower} Buffer.

name: Mazaleth's Gift
description: Gain {RitualPower} Ritual.

name: Orobic Acid
description: Add a random Attack, Skill, and Power into your Hand. They're free to play this turn.
description_raw: Add a random Attack, Skill, and Power into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. They're free to play this turn.

name: Poison Potion
description: Apply {PoisonPower} Poison.

name: Pot of Ghouls
description: Add {Cards} {Cards:plural:Soul|Souls} into your Hand.

name: Potion of Binding
description: Apply {WeakPower:diff()} Weak and {VulnerablePower:diff()} Vulnerable to ALL enemies.

name: Potion of Capacity
description: Gain {Repeat} Orb {Repeat:plural:Slot|Slots}.

name: Potion of Doom
description: Apply {DoomPower} Doom.

name: Potion-Shaped Rock
description: Deal {Damage} damage.

name: Powdered Demise
description: Enemy loses {Demise} HP at the end of each of its turns.
description_raw: Enemy loses [blue]{Demise}[/blue] HP at the end of each of its turns.

name: Power Potion
description: Choose 1 of 3 random Power cards to add into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.
description_raw: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random Power cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.

name: Radiant Tincture
description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Gain an additional {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of your next {RadiancePower} {RadiancePower:plural:turn|turns}.
description_raw: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Gain an additional {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} at the start of your next [blue]{RadiancePower}[/blue] {RadiancePower:plural:turn|turns}.

name: Regen Potion
description: Gain {RegenPower} Regen.

name: Shackling Potion
description: ALL enemies lose {StrengthPower} Strength this turn.

name: Ship in a Bottle
description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Next turn, gain {Block:diff()} Block.

name: Skill Potion
description: Choose 1 of 3 random Skill cards to add into your Hand. It's free to play this turn.
description_raw: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] random Skill cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It's free to play this turn.

name: Snecko Oil
description: Draw {Cards} cards. Randomize the cost of cards in your Hand this turn.
description_raw: Draw [blue]{Cards}[/blue] cards. Randomize the cost of cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.

name: Soldier's Stew
description: All cards containing Strike gain 1 Replay this combat.
description_raw: All cards containing [gold]Strike[/gold] gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Replay[/gold] this combat.

name: Speed Potion
description: Gain {DexterityPower} Dexterity. At the end of your turn, lose {DexterityPower} Dexterity.
description_raw: Gain [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. At the end of your turn, lose [blue]{DexterityPower}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

name: Stable Serum
description: Retain your Hand for {Repeat} {Repeat:plural:turn|turns}.

name: Star Potion
description: Gain {Stars:starIcons()}.

name: Strength Potion
description: Gain {StrengthPower} Strength.

name: Swift Potion
description: Draw {Cards} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.

name: Touch of Insanity
description: Choose a card in your Hand. It is free to play this combat.
description_raw: Choose a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. It is free to play this combat.

name: Vulnerable Potion
description: Apply {VulnerablePower} Vulnerable.

name: Weak Potion
description: Apply {WeakPower} Weak.
